content: He worked as a coachman for a while, and later he joined the "Assembly of khanandas" organized by Haji Husu , where he learned classical Eastern and Azerbaijani mughams from Haji Husu and Mashadi Isi
summary: He worked as a coachman for a while, and later he joined the "Assembly of khanandas" organized by Haji Husu , where he learned classical Eastern and Azerbaijani mughams from Haji Husu and Mashadi Isi
